name: West Indian Curry Powder
recipeInstructions: Hindus who migrated to the West Indies in the 19th century introduced their spice blends to the islands, and curries are now found throughout the region. Dry roast all the whole spices for about five minutes. Allow them to cool completely before grinding and blending with the ginger and turmeric. Store the powder in an airtight jar; it will keep for three to four months.
